evals.prompt: Create project context for this workspace. We have full meeting transcripts in Fathom, a production app repo in ./app, delivery tracking in Linear, and code review in GitHub. Do not read the full transcripts yet.
evals.expected_output: Should create or update .agents/project-context.md. Should treat the workspace as the project boundary, not assume ./app is the whole project. Should record Fathom/transcript location as a source system without ingesting full transcripts. Should include Linear and GitHub as source/execution systems. Should mark unknown decision-log location as TBD if not provided.
assertions: Does not ingest full transcripts by default
Records transcript location as a source system
Treats workspace as broader than production repo
Marks missing decision-log location as TBD or equivalent

evals.prompt: Use project-context for a client project with two repos: web-app and api. Decisions happen in weekly calls and follow-up emails. There is no formal decision log yet.
evals.expected_output: Should create a compact .agents/project-context.md that supports multiple repos. Should not create a fake docs/decisions location. Should capture current decision source locations as weekly calls and follow-up emails, while marking canonical decision log as TBD or not yet defined.
assertions: Supports multiple repositories inside one project workspace
Does not assume a committed docs/decisions folder exists
Captures calls and emails as current decision source locations
Marks canonical decision location as TBD or not yet defined

evals.prompt: Update existing project context with this change: Mira now reviews requirements before tickets are finalized. Keep the existing useful context.
evals.expected_output: Should read existing .agents/project-context.md first if present, preserve useful existing context, update review and approval rules, and summarize what changed. Should not rewrite unrelated sections unnecessarily.
